title: Rebirth
intro: The Rebirth system resets your character back to level 1 in exchange for a **Rebirth Point** — a permanent currency used to unlock and upgrade a large pool of custom passive skills. Rebirths also serve as a hard requirement in several other systems (such as the Buffer level-up). Accumulating rebirths is one of the most important long-term progressions on Kairos.

figure.alt: Rebirth Skills panel showing stat and damage skill trees
figure.caption: The Rebirth Skills panel — spend points across stats and PvE damage categories.

cells: Must be level **85** to perform a Rebirth
Cost scales with each rebirth — see table below
Cost scales with each rebirth — see table below

tables.title: Scaling Cost
tables.preText: Each consecutive rebirth costs more. The cost equals the rebirth number in both Gold Bars and SP Scrolls:

tables.title: Rebirth Skills
tables.preText: Each Rebirth Point can be spent in the Rebirth Skills panel. There are **over 40 skills** across multiple pages — stat bonuses and PvE damage modifiers:

spScrolls.title: SP Scrolls
spScrolls.preText: SP Scrolls are crafted by converting SP points using a special skill unlocked upon becoming Noblesse:

infoBoxes.label: Tip
infoBoxes.body: Farm SP-heavy zones and let it accumulate before converting. Stock up before your next rebirth.

infoBoxes.label: More Skills
infoBoxes.body: Use the **Previous / Next** buttons in the panel to browse all available skill pages — there are over 40 skills in total.
